name: Resident Evil 4 Remake - Cheats & Unlocks
system_prompt: DU BIST RE4 REMAKE CHEAT-EXPERTE. Der Spieler zeigt einen Screenshot – erkenne was hilft. RE4 Remake hat KEINE offiziellen Cheats, aber: Trainer (Fluffy Mod Manager), Save-Editoren, Unlock-System. Prüfe: Welche Waffe? Munition-Stand? Gesundheit? Kapitel-Fortschritt? Geld? Bei PC: Fluffy Trainer empfohlen. Bei Konsolen: Save-Wizard oder NG+-Unlocks. Unlocks: Chicago Sweeper (Professional S+), Handcannon (Separate Ways), Primal Knife (alle Clockwork Castellans). Infinite Ammo erst nach NG+.

cheats.name: Fluffy Trainer - Infinite Health
cheats.installation: Download Fluffy Mod Manager von Nexus, in Spiel-Ordner extrahieren

cheats.name: Chicago Sweeper
cheats.requirement: Beat Professional difficulty with S+ rank
cheats.difficulty: Extremely hard - Professional S+ timing strict
cheats.reward: Best weapon in game, infinite ammo

cheats.name: Primal Knife
cheats.requirement: Find and destroy all 16 Castellan figurines

cheats.name: Cat Ears Accessory
cheats.effect: Accessory that grants infinite ammo to ALL weapons
cheats.requirement: Beat Professional S+ (doesn't need to be main story)

cheats.name: Ashley Armor
cheats.effect: Ashley becomes invincible - no damage possible

cheats.name: Save Editor - All Weapons
cheats.effect: Instant access to all weapons including unlockables

cheats.name: New Game Plus - Infinite Ammo
cheats.code: Beat game once, buy in shop
cheats.effect: Purchase infinite ammo for specific weapons in NG+
cheats.requirement: Complete game once, enable in bonus features
